{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Public Relations Officer",
  "description": "Ganfeng Lithium Industry Limited is amining company engaged in the exploration, mining, and processing of lithium. With a strong presence across the country, the company operates branches in Lagos, Abuja, and Nasarawa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Public Relations Officer&nbsp;
Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a smart, confident, and proactive male candidate to join our team as a Public Relations Officer. The ideal candidate will represent the company positively, manage external relations, and ensure smooth follow-up on official matters.


Key Responsibilities


	Represent the company in a professional and positive manner
	Build and maintain a strong public image for the organization
	Handle follow-ups on company permits, documentation, and external engagements
	Liaise with government agencies and other stakeholders
	Ensure effective communication between the company and the public
	Monitor and report on ongoing external matters


Requirements


	Must be male
	Must be fluent in Hausa language
	Previous experience working in public Relations
	Strong written and oral communication skills
	Good interpersonal and public relations skills
	Ability to follow up effectively and pay attention to detail
	Must be proactive, responsible, and well-organized.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: ganfenglithiumindustrylimited1@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Public Relations Officer Job at Ganfeng Lithium Industry Limited




        
    

        
        Ganfeng Lithium Industry Limited is amining company engaged in the exploration, mining, and processing of lithium. With a strong presence across the country, the company operates branches in Lagos, Abuja, and Nasarawa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Public Relations Officer 
Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a smart, confident, and proactive male candidate to join our team as a Public Relations Officer. The ideal candidate will represent the company positively, manage external relations, and ensure smooth follow-up on official matters.


Key Responsibilities


	Represent the company in a professional and positive manner
	Build and maintain a strong public image for the organization
	Handle follow-ups on company permits, documentation, and external engagements
	Liaise with government agencies and other stakeholders
	Ensure effective communication between the company and the public
	Monitor and report on ongoing external matters


Requirements


	Must be male
	Must be fluent in Hausa language
	Previous experience working in public Relations
	Strong written and oral communication skills
	Good interpersonal and public relations skills
	Ability to follow up effectively and pay attention to detail
	Must be proactive, responsible, and well-organized.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Business Development Officer",
  "description": "Yimei Nigeria Limited is a hospitality and hotel management company operating as part of the broader Yimei Group, an international hotel chain focused on the fast-growing African market.

The company specializes in hotel development, management, and franchising, offering a range of accommodation options from budget to upscale through its various hotel brands. Established in Nigeria in 2020, Yimei Nigeria Limited is headquartered in Ikeja, Lagos, and has rapidly expanded its footprint with multiple hotel operations across Lagos.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Business Development Officer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Hospitality

Job Summary


	Yimei Nigeria Limited is seeking an experienced and result-driven Senior Business Development Specialist with a strong background in the hospitality industry.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for identifying business opportunities, driving revenue growth, building strategic partnerships, and expanding the company&rsquo;s footprint within the hospitality sector.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify, develop, and secure new business opportunities within the hospitality industry (hotels, serviced apartments, resorts, etc.)
	Build and maintain strong relationships with property owners, partners, and key stakeholders
	Conduct market research and competitor analysis to identify trends and growth opportunities
	Lead negotiations and close high-value deals, including property acquisition, leasing, or management agreements
	Develop and implement strategic business development plans aligned with company objectives
	Collaborate with internal teams (operations, project, finance) to ensure smooth project execution
	Prepare business proposals, presentations, and feasibility reports
	Track and report on business development performance, including pipeline and revenue targets
	Represent the company at industry events, meetings, and networking platforms.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Hospitality Management, or related field (MBA is an advantage)
	5&ndash;8 years of experience in business development within the hospitality industry
	Proven track record of closing deals and achieving revenue targets
	Strong network within the hospitality or real estate sector
	Excellent negotiation, communication, and presentation skills
	Strong analytical and strategic thinking abilities
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and business reporting tools.


Key Competencies:


	Business Acumen
	Strategic Thinking
	Relationship Management
	Negotiation &amp; Influencing Skills
	Results-Oriented Mindset.
	Leadership and Team Collaboration.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and performance-based incentives
	Opportunity to work in a growing and dynamic organization
	Career growth and development opportunities.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: oluwaseyi.agunbiade@yiwill.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Senior Business Development Officer Job at Yimei Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Yimei Nigeria Limited is a hospitality and hotel management company operating as part of the broader Yimei Group, an international hotel chain focused on the fast-growing African market.

The company specializes in hotel development, management, and franchising, offering a range of accommodation options from budget to upscale through its various hotel brands. Established in Nigeria in 2020, Yimei Nigeria Limited is headquartered in Ikeja, Lagos, and has rapidly expanded its footprint with multiple hotel operations across Lagos.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Business Development Officer
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Hospitality

Job Summary


	Yimei Nigeria Limited is seeking an experienced and result-driven Senior Business Development Specialist with a strong background in the hospitality industry.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for identifying business opportunities, driving revenue growth, building strategic partnerships, and expanding the company’s footprint within the hospitality sector.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify, develop, and secure new business opportunities within the hospitality industry (hotels, serviced apartments, resorts, etc.)
	Build and maintain strong relationships with property owners, partners, and key stakeholders
	Conduct market research and competitor analysis to identify trends and growth opportunities
	Lead negotiations and close high-value deals, including property acquisition, leasing, or management agreements
	Develop and implement strategic business development plans aligned with company objectives
	Collaborate with internal teams (operations, project, finance) to ensure smooth project execution
	Prepare business proposals, presentations, and feasibility reports
	Track and report on business development performance, including pipeline and revenue targets
	Represent the company at industry events, meetings, and networking platforms.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Hospitality Management, or related field (MBA is an advantage)
	5–8 years of experience in business development within the hospitality industry
	Proven track record of closing deals and achieving revenue targets
	Strong network within the hospitality or real estate sector
	Excellent negotiation, communication, and presentation skills
	Strong analytical and strategic thinking abilities
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and business reporting tools.


Key Competencies:


	Business Acumen
	Strategic Thinking
	Relationship Management
	Negotiation & Influencing Skills
	Results-Oriented Mindset.
	Leadership and Team Collaboration.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and performance-based incentives
	Opportunity to work in a growing and dynamic organization
	Career growth and development opportunities.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Ganfeng Lithium Industry Limited is amining company engaged in the exploration, mining, and processing of lithium. With a strong presence across the country, the company operates branches in Lagos, Abuja, and Nasarawa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Civil Engineer

Job Location: Endo, Nasarawa
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are currently recruiting a qualified Civil Engineer for our factory project in Nasarawa State.


Responsibilities


	Supervise construction and civil works on site
	Monitor project progress and ensure quality standards
	Coordinate site activities and report to management
	Ensure compliance with safety and engineering standards


Job Requirements


	B.Sc / HND in Civil Engineering
	Minimum of 2 years of relevant experience
	Good knowledge of construction and site supervision
	Ability to read and interpret construction drawings
	Proficiency in AutoCAD and other related software is an added advantage
	Strong communication and organizational skills
	Must be hardworking and ready to work in Nasarawa State.


Salary
Negotiable and attractive.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified applicants should send their CV to: ganfenglithiumindustrylimited1@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Civil Engineer Job at Ganfeng Lithium Industry Limited




        
    

        
        Ganfeng Lithium Industry Limited is amining company engaged in the exploration, mining, and processing of lithium. With a strong presence across the country, the company operates branches in Lagos, Abuja, and Nasarawa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Civil Engineer

Job Location: Endo, Nasarawa
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are currently recruiting a qualified Civil Engineer for our factory project in Nasarawa State.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Supervise construction and civil works on site
	Monitor project progress and ensure quality standards
	Coordinate site activities and report to management
	Ensure compliance with safety and engineering standards


Job Requirements


	B.Sc / HND in Civil Engineering
	Minimum of 2 years of relevant experience
	Good knowledge of construction and site supervision
	Ability to read and interpret construction drawings
	Proficiency in AutoCAD and other related software is an added advantage
	Strong communication and organizational skills
	Must be hardworking and ready to work in Nasarawa State.


Salary
Negotiable and attractive.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified applicants should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Safety Manager",
  "description": "Ganfeng Lithium Industry Limited is amining company engaged in the exploration, mining, and processing of lithium. With a strong presence across the country, the company operates branches in Lagos, Abuja, and Nasarawa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Safety Manager

Job Location: Endo, Nasarawa
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking an experienced Safety Manager to oversee and enforce health and safety standards at our mining site/factory in Nasarawa.
	The ideal candidate will ensure compliance with all safety regulations, promote a safe working environment, and minimize workplace risks.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop, implement, and monitor health and safety policies and procedures
	Ensure compliance with local and international safety regulations
	Conduct regular safety inspections, audits, and risk assessments
	Investigate accidents/incidents and implement corrective actions
	Organize safety training and awareness programs for staff
	Monitor the use of personal protective equipment (PPE)
	Maintain safety records and prepare reports for management
	Liaise with regulatory authorities on safety compliance matters
	Promote a strong safety culture across the organization


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Engineering, Environmental Science, or related field
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in a mining or industrial environment
	Professional certification in HSE (e.g., NEBOSH, IOSH) is an advantage
	Strong knowledge of safety regulations and risk management
	Excellent leadership and communication skills
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: ganfenglithiumindustrylimited1@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Safety Manager Job at Ganfeng Lithium Industry Limited




        
    

        
        Ganfeng Lithium Industry Limited is amining company engaged in the exploration, mining, and processing of lithium. With a strong presence across the country, the company operates branches in Lagos, Abuja, and Nasarawa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Safety Manager

Job Location: Endo, Nasarawa
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking an experienced Safety Manager to oversee and enforce health and safety standards at our mining site/factory in Nasarawa.
	The ideal candidate will ensure compliance with all safety regulations, promote a safe working environment, and minimize workplace risks.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop, implement, and monitor health and safety policies and procedures
	Ensure compliance with local and international safety regulations
	Conduct regular safety inspections, audits, and risk assessments
	Investigate accidents/incidents and implement corrective actions
	Organize safety training and awareness programs for staff
	Monitor the use of personal protective equipment (PPE)
	Maintain safety records and prepare reports for management
	Liaise with regulatory authorities on safety compliance matters
	Promote a strong safety culture across the organization


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering, Environmental Science, or related field
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in a mining or industrial environment
	Professional certification in HSE (e.g., NEBOSH, IOSH) is an advantage
	Strong knowledge of safety regulations and risk management
	Excellent leadership and communication skills
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
